content:
✅ Why This Works:
• Gives the XP race meaning up until the very last week.
• Adds high-stakes strategic play to the endgame.
• Encourages XP leaders to think critically about their choices.

📌 Final Lock-In Questions for Version 6.2

1. Should XP be spent freely, or should students be given a “banking” limit per unit?

✔ If free-spending, students can strategize all semester.
✔ If banking is required, students must manage a finite resource carefully.

2. Should XP transactions be open to the class, or should some be allowed in secret?

✔ If public, all trades and sacrifices are open knowledge.
✔ If secret, students could attempt deception (but it would have risks).

3. Should the XP Leader have the option to “abdicate” their power and give it to another player?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 272 (chunk 272/555)
